title: Wanted World
description: Turn your world into a true FNaF World-inspired adventure! Wanted World expands Management Wanted
body:
Wanted World is an expansion addon for Management Wanted that transforms exploration into an exciting adventure inspired by the charm and mystery of FNaF World.

Travel across the world to discover brand-new structures, encounter unique animatronics, uncover hidden secrets, and find rare characters scattered throughout your journey. Every location offers new opportunities for exploration and collection.

Features

🌎 New World Structures

Explore numerous new locations generated throughout the world.
Discover unique landmarks inspired by the colorful and mysterious atmosphere of FNaF World.

🤖 Collectible Animatronics

Find and unlock brand-new animatronics.
Encounter characters hidden throughout the world.

🔍 Secret Locations

Explore hidden structures containing rare rewards and surprises.
Search for areas that are difficult to find and packed with secrets.

⭐ Secret Animatronics

Discover exclusive animatronics hidden in special locations.
Some characters can only be found by dedicated explorers.

🗺️ Exploration-Focused Gameplay

Encourages players to travel farther and investigate every corner of the world.
Turns exploration into a rewarding adventure.

🎮 Built for Management Wanted

Designed to seamlessly expand the existing gameplay experience.
